name: cursor-desktop-pet
description: Cross-platform desktop pet experiments for macOS and Windows.
author: cursor-desktop

scripts.check: node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/app-updater.js && node --check electron/agent-hook-status.js && node --check electron/dialogue-catalog.js && node --check electron/live2d-catalog.js && node --check electron/focus-host-window.js && node --check electron/idle-mode-controller.js && node --check electron/pet-physics-controller.js && node --check electron/pet-size.js && node --check electron/screen-awareness-controller.js && node --check electron/screen-awareness-rules.js && node --check electron/state-store.js && node --check electron/window-snap-controller.js && node --check src/pet.js && node --check src/speech-layout.js && node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/live2d/live2d-viewer.js && node --check scripts/start-electron.js && node --test test/*.test.js
